title: Is Hideaki Anno one of Shinjis in Evangelion Rebuild multiverse
display_title: Is Hideaki Anno one of Shinjis in Evangelion Rebuild multiverse
wikitext:
[]: Is Hideaki Anno one of Shinjis in Evangelion Rebuild multiverse?             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Tue Dec 17, 2024 8:01 am As Ikari Gendo said, and as pretty evident from what is going on in the Minus-space, every sequence in Golgotha object is structured from memories of those who are currently present in there. This is the world of your memories. Our senses can't perceive the anti-universe. Therefore, the LCL has created a virtual environment we can perceive.

[]: Re: Is Hideaki Anno one of Shinjis in Evangelion Rebuild multiverse?             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Dec 17, 2024 2:19 pm Functionally Shinji, the established character in the 3.5 movies, stops existing after the scene in the Wunder when his eyes turn purple and he turns into a puppet for the movie to dispose of all secondary characters with a overly preachy send off (Misato, Gendo, Kaworu, Asuka, Rei).

[]: Re: Is Hideaki Anno one of Shinjis in Evangelion Rebuild multiverse?             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Tue Dec 17, 2024 8:11 pm Joseki wrote: Functionally Shinji, the established character in the 3.5 movies, stops existing after the scene in the Wunder when his eyes turn purple and he turns into a puppet for the movie to dispose of all secondary characters with a overly preachy send off (Misato, Gendo, Kaworu, Asuka, Rei).
